since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -1.06% · Gold -3.39% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.29%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.29%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +4.65%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +4.65%, MU +3.42%, ARM +2.87%, AVGO +2.10%, MRVL +1.62%. Laggards: ZBRA -3.24%, SPCX -2.72%, PLTR -2.44%, BABA -1.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.72% at $151.87
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
